sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55765" key="katenexura/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατενεχῠρ-άζω</orth>, <sense id="n55765.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pledge, pawn</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:84" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.84</biblScope> </bibl> (<abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l.</abbr> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατενεχῠρ-ιάζω</orth>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:8:148" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.148</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
